title: Bandh Baretha
tagline: Bandh Baretha — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: Bandh Baretha is a freshwater man-made wetland and wildlife sanctuary covering an area of 10 square kilometers.
overview.description: Bandh Baretha is a freshwater man-made wetland and wildlife sanctuary covering an area of 10 square kilometers. It is located approximately 50 kilometers south of Bharatpur city, in the Bayana tehsil of Bharatpur, India. This sanctuary serves as a significant winter resort for migratory birds and plays a crucial role in storing drinking water for the region.

topPlaces.name: Nagla Tula
topPlaces.description: Nagla Tula is a village in Rajasthan, India. Administratively, it is under Rudawal ILRC, Roopwas Tehsil, Bharatpur District, Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Bayana
topPlaces.description: Bayana is a historical town and the headquarters of Bayana tehsil in the Bharatpur district of Rajasthan, India. Hindaun, the nearest city to Bayana, is just 33 km (21 mi) away.

items.note: Nagla Tula is a village in Rajasthan, India. Administratively, it is under Rudawal ILRC, Roopwas Tehsil, Bharatpur District, Rajasthan.
Bayana is a historical town and the headquarters of Bayana tehsil in the Bharatpur district of Rajasthan, India. Hindaun, the nearest city to Bayana, is just 33 km (21 mi) away.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bandh Baretha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bandh Baretha is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bandh Baretha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bandh Baretha?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bandh Baretha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bandh Baretha?
faq.a: Stays in Bandh Baretha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bandh Baretha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nagla Tula, Bayana.
